name: Weak Encoding for Password
description: The product obscures a password with a trivial encoding (such as Base64 or ROT13) instead of using cryptographic hashing. Trivial encoding is easily reversible and provides no meaningful protection against an attacker who obtains the encoded value.
detection_pattern: Look for AUTH data (passwords, credentials) flowing through TRANSFORM nodes (Base64 encode, ROT13, XOR obfuscation, simple encoding) to STORAGE nodes (databases, files, configuration) without a CONTROL mediator (cryptographic hash function, bcrypt/scrypt/argon2, proper key derivation) that applies irreversible cryptographic protection before storage.
